name: 2.2bu Flexible Laundry Hamper Gray - Brightroom™
description:
Brush aside laundry day blues with the help of this Flexible Laundry Hamper from Brightroom™. Featuring a deep cylindrical silhouette with an open top design, this laundry basket makes sorting through laundry a breeze. It's designed with two side cutout handles for easy lifting and carrying to the laundry room. Showcasing a diamond mesh design for ventilation, this laundry basket features a solid gray hue to coordinate with a variety of decor styles.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
